coupons.description: Extra 10% off select AeroTower, Air Purifier, Dehumidifier, Headphones, LG Styler, Soundbars, Soundbar Accessories, Vacuum, Wireless Speaker. Extra 10% off select AeroTower, Air Purifier, Dehumidifier, Headphones, LG Styler, Vacuum, Wireless Speakers is off the pre-tax sale price on LG.com only. Offer valid for one-time use only within 30 days of code being sent. To receive the additional 10% off savings, promotion code must be entered at online checkout and will be applied to eligible products only. If any of the qualifying items are removed from the cart, canceled or returned, the promotional savings will be void. Availability, prices and terms of offer are subject to change without notice. send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS using the "Escalation template"
templates: For 10% off welcome code issues use temp 'Follow up 1', then 'Follow up 2' after confirming the item is excluded from promos
For fridge recommendations use FRR shortcut
For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut
For cxs looking for replacement parts/accessories from an affiliate Parts Distributor use RPA shortcut
If a cx has an inquiry for finding the serial number/model number of an item:
➜ If it's a TV, use mnt shortcut
➜ If it's another product, use mna shortcut
dos_and_donts: If it's a new conversation and we didn't introduce ourselves in the automated message, start your message with: "This is Jordan at LG."

Anything I can help with?

When will your cloud t shirt and shorts be in stock? They have been out of stock over a month

Comfrt: Thank you for reaching out, and we apologize for the inconvenience caused by the out-of-stock items. Don't worry, we're working diligently to restock them this month. In the meantime, please visit the product pages for the Cloud Tee and Shorts, select your desired size and color, and click "notify when available." This will ensure you receive an SMS notification as soon as the items are back in stock.

Additionally, if you're interested, our Tranquil Shorts are available in various colors and sizes ranging from XS to XL - https://comfrt.attn.tv/sl/W6m-OUrk

While the Cloud Tee is unavailable at the moment, you might want to check out one of our bestselling hoodies - https://comfrt.attn.tv/sl/TlXbgzu1 

If you have any further questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to help!
